mapper.select: SELECT m.*, p.name AS parent_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN parent p ON m.parent_id = p.id ORDER BY m.id
SELECT m.*, p.name AS parent_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN parent p ON m.parent_id = p.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (parent_id, content, reply, replier_id, status, reply_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{content}, #{reply}, #{replierId}, #{status}, #{replyTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET parent_id=#{parentId}, content=#{content}, reply=#{reply}, replier_id=#{replierId}, status=#{status}, reply_time=#{replyTime} WHERE id = #{id}
